info.title: HubSpot.Cli
info.description: CLI tool for interacting with the HubSpot API

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: HubSpot CLI — interact with the HubSpot API from the command line

options.name: --token
options.description: HubSpot access token (overrides env var and config file)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format: json, table, csv [default: Json]

commands.name: list
commands.description: List property definitions for an object type

commands.name: groups
commands.description: List property groups for an object type

commands.name: list
commands.description: List pipelines for an object type

arguments.name: objectType
arguments.description: CRM object type (typically deals or tickets)

commands.name: batch-read
commands.description: Batch read associations between object types

options.name: --ids
options.description: Object IDs to read associations for

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort field (hs_name, createdAt, updatedAt; prefix with - for descending)

commands.name: campaigns-get
commands.description: Get a marketing campaign by GUID

commands.name: emails-get
commands.description: Get a marketing email by ID

options.name: --custom-property
options.description: Custom template properties as key=value pairs

options.name: --query
options.description: External event ID to search for

commands.name: event
commands.description: Get a marketing event by external ID

commands.name: post
commands.description: Get a blog post by ID

commands.name: redirect
commands.description: Get a URL redirect by ID

commands.name: settings
commands.description: Get webhook settings for an app

commands.name: list
commands.description: List webhook subscriptions for an app

options.name: --object-type-id
options.description: Object type ID for object-specific events
